inputs.label: Volume (mL)
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the solution in milliliters.

inputs.label: Target concentration (g/100mL)
inputs.businessContext: Desired sodium chloride concentration for isotonicity (typically 0.9% w/v).

inputs.label: Drug 1 amount (g)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the first active ingredient in grams.

inputs.label: Drug 1 E-value
inputs.businessContext: Sodium chloride equivalent of the first drug (g NaCl per g drug).

inputs.label: Drug 2 amount (g)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the second active ingredient in grams.

inputs.label: Drug 2 E-value
inputs.businessContext: Sodium chloride equivalent of the second drug (g NaCl per g drug).
